_comment: Derived from src/data/plan.js. specIds/smartTopic/minutes/note are copied verbatim from the app's real plan so this never drifts. agentPlan is the only thing added: which agents act each day and on what. learningDay => explainer+question-generator+validator build content for specIds; reviewDay => mock-runner runs a mock on smartTopic, validator marks, supervisor refreshes weakTopics. feature-builder runs every day on the backlog unless a review/mock needs it.

days.title: Atoms, formulae & equations
days.note: GCSE overlap — go fast. Nail writing/balancing equations and ions.

days.title: The mole + core calculations
days.note: HIGHEST-frequency topic on the paper. n=m/M, gas volumes, pV=nRT.

days.title: Empirical formulae, concentration, yield
days.note: Empirical/molecular formula, mol dm⁻³, % yield, atom economy.

days.title: Acids & titration calculations
days.note: HIGH. Titration sums are guaranteed marks — drill the method.

days.title: Redox & half-equations
days.note: HIGH. Oxidation numbers rules + combining half-equations.

days.title: Electron structure & configuration
days.note: HIGH. s/p/d notation up to Z=36, including ions.

days.title: Module 2 past-paper practice
days.note: No new content. Smart Mark: Moles, Redox, Electron Structure. Clear error log.

agentPlan.mock-runner: assemble Module 2 mock (Moles + Redox + Electron Structure) from content/questions
agentPlan.explainer: regenerate notes for any flagged weak topic
agentPlan.question-generator: top up banks for flagged weak topics

days.title: Bonding, electronegativity & polarity
days.note: Some GCSE overlap. Add dative bonds, electronegativity, polar molecules.

days.title: Shapes of molecules (VSEPR) + IMFs
days.note: HIGH. Learn shapes/angles + lone-pair effect; H-bonding vs London.

days.title: Enthalpy & calorimetry
days.note: HIGH. Definitions + q=mcΔT, then ΔH per mole.

days.title: Hess's law & bond enthalpies
days.note: HIGH. Hess cycles + average bond enthalpy calculations.

days.title: Equilibrium & Le Chatelier + Kc
days.note: HIGH. Predict shifts; write and calculate Kc.

days.title: Reaction rates
days.note: MED. Collision theory, Boltzmann distribution, catalysts.

days.title: Module 3 past-paper practice
days.note: No new content. Smart Mark: Enthalpy, Equilibrium. Clear error log.

agentPlan.mock-runner: assemble Module 3 mock (Enthalpy + Equilibrium + Rates) from content/questions
agentPlan.explainer: regenerate notes for any flagged weak topic
agentPlan.question-generator: top up banks for flagged weak topics

days.title: Periodicity & ionisation energies
days.note: MED. Trends across/down; successive IE as evidence for shells.

days.title: Groups 2 & 7 + ion tests
days.note: MED. Reactivity trends, displacement, disproportionation, qualitative tests.

days.title: Organic basics: naming, isomers, mechanisms
days.note: MED. IUPAC names, E/Z, curly arrows — underpins all organic marks.

days.title: Alkanes & alkenes mechanisms
days.note: MED. Free-radical substitution + electrophilic addition (learn the steps).

days.title: Alcohols & haloalkanes
days.note: MED. Oxidation of alcohols; nucleophilic substitution & hydrolysis.

days.title: IR & mass spectrometry + practical skills
days.note: MED. IR bond ranges, M⁺ peak/fragmentation, practical evaluation language.

days.title: Timed full paper + weakness blitz
days.note: Sit a full Paper 1 timed. Log the % in Past Papers. Blitz weakest HIGH topics in the error log. This is the experiment result.

agentPlan.mock-runner: assemble a full mixed Paper-1-shaped mock from all banks
agentPlan.supervisor: write final result to coordinator/results + dashboard
